title: Just Enough Survival
description: A modpack that extends the vanilla Minecraft experience and makes survival more challenging!
body:
**🌍 About This Modpack**

This modpack is my take for a Minecraft world that is more alive, more beautiful, and more fun to survive in, without adding confusing new systems or major overhauls. You will find better terrain, smarter mobs, smoother performance, and tons of new places to explore. It is still Minecraft, just with a lot more to discover.

---

### 🗺️ World Generation

* [**Tectonic**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tectonic) – Adds mountain ranges and new terrain shapes
* [**Terralith**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/terralith) – Nearly 100 new realistic and fantasy biomes
* [**Universal Ores**](https://modrinth.com/mod/universal_ores) – Ore variants in andesite, diorite, granite, and tuff

---

### 🧱 Structures

* [**Additional Structures**](https://modrinth.com/mod/additional-structures) – Adds over 200 new structures
* [**Dungeons and Taverns**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/dungeons-and-taverns) – Adds dungeons, taverns, ruins, shrines and much more
* [**Illager Invasion**](https://modrinth.com/mod/illager-invasion) – New illager types and dangerous new structures
* [**It Takes a Pillage Continuation**](https://modrinth.com/mod/it-takes-a-pillage-continuation/) – Pillager encampments and fortresses
* [**YUNG's Better Desert Temples**](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-desert-temples) - Replaces vanilla desert temples
* [**YUNG's Better Dungeons**](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-dungeons) - Replaces vanilla dungeons
* [**YUNG's Better End Island**](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-end-island) - Replaces vanilla end island
* [**YUNG's Better Jungle Temples**](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-jungle-temples) - Replaces vanilla jungle temples
* [**YUNG's Better Mineshafts**](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-mineshafts) - Replaces vanilla mineshafts
* [**YUNG's Better Nether Fortresses**](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-nether-fortresses) - Replaces vanilla nether fortresses
* [**YUNG's Better Ocean Monuments**](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-ocean-monuments) - Replaces vanilla ocean monuments
* [**YUNG's Better Strongholds**](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-strongholds) - Replaces vanilla strongholds
* [**YUNG's Better Witch Huts**](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-witch-huts) - Replaces vanilla witch huts
* [**YUNG's Extras**](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-extras) – Ruins, obelisks, and other small features
* [**Towns and Towers**](https://modrinth.com/mod/towns-and-towers) – New villages, outposts, and ships
* [**Villages & Pillages**](https://modrinth.com/mod/villages-and-pillages) – Witch villages and more
* [**Sparse Structures**](https://modrinth.com/mod/sparsestructures) – Makes structures more rare for better pacing

---

### ⚙️ Gameplay

* [**Comforts**](https://modrinth.com/mod/comforts) – Sleeping bags and hammocks (which do not set the spawn point)
* [**Dehydration**](https://modrinth.com/mod/dehydration) – Adds thirst and purified water
* [**Zombie Awareness**](https://modrinth.com/mod/zombie-awareness) – Smarter mobs that track players
* [**Small Ships**](https://modrinth.com/mod/small-ships) – Adds drivable ships and boats
* [**Waystones**](https://modrinth.com/mod/waystones) – Place and find teleport points across the world
* [**Stoneworks**](https://modrinth.com/mod/stoneworks) – New stone block variants for building
* [**Farmer's Delight Refabricated**](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated) – New crops, food, and cooking
* [**No F3/Debug Screen**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/no-debug-screen) - Removes game-related information from debug screen

---

### 🧰 Quality of Life

* [**AppleSkin**](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) – Shows food values and saturation
* [**Block Runner**](https://modrinth.com/mod/block-runner) – Makes you walk faster on certain blocks
* [**Cut Through**](https://modrinth.com/mod/cut-through) – Swing through grass and leaves without breaking them
* [**Debugify**](https://modrinth.com/mod/debugify) – Fixes Minecraft bugs
* [**Horseman**](https://modrinth.com/mod/horseman) – Better horse movement and controls
* [**Inventory Management**](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-management) – Sort and transfer items with the click of a button
* [**Overflowing Bars**](https://modrinth.com/mod/overflowing-bars) – Nice and compact health, armor and armor toughness bars
* [**Mouse Tweaks**](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-tweaks) – Enhances inventory management by adding various functions to the mouse buttons
* [**Elytra Slot**](https://modrinth.com/mod/elytra-slot) – Lets you wear elytra and chestplate at the same time

---

### 🎧 Sounds

* [**Sound Physics Remastered**](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered) – Provides realistic sound attenuation, reverberation, and absorption through blocks
* [**Sounds**](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound) – Adds a wide range of new and improved sound effects

---

### 🖼️ Visuals

* [**Distant Horizons**](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons) – See far-off terrain with level of detail (LOD)
* [**Iris Shaders**](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) – Adds shader support
* [**LambDynamicLights**](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights) – Glowing items and mobs light up the world
* [**Visuality**](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality) – Adds small particle effects and visuals

---

### 🔧 Optimization

* [**BadOptimizations**](https://modrinth.com/mod/badoptimizations) - A collection of mostly micro optimizations
* [**Concurrent Chunk Management Engine**](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric)
* [**Enhanced Block Entities**](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe) - Increases the performance of block entity rendering
* [**Entity Culling**](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) - Adds path-tracing to skip rendering Block/Entities that are not visible
* [**Fast Item Frames**](https://modrinth.com/mod/fast-item-frames) - Faster and better item frames
* [**Faster Random**](https://modrinth.com/mod/faster-random) - Faster Random Generator
* [**FerriteCore**](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) - Reduces the memory usage
* [**ImmediatelyFast**](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast) - Speeds up immediate mode rendering
* [**Krypton**](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton) - Optimize the networking stack
* [**Lithium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) - Game logic optimization (physics, AI, block ticking)
* [**ModernFix**](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix) - Improves performance, reduces memory usage, and fixes many bugs
* [**More Culling**](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling) - Improves performance with more culling
* [**Noisium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/noisium) - Optimises worldgen performance
* [**ScalableLux**](https://modrinth.com/mod/scalablelux) - Improves the performance of light updates
* [**Sodium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) - A better rendering engine

---

### 🐟 Others

* [**Birds Boids**](https://modrinth.com/mod/birds-boids-addon) – Adds ambient birds
* [**Boids**](https://modrinth.com/mod/boids) – Boids simulation for flocking fish
* [**More Mobs**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/more-mobs) – Many new variants for humanoid mobs
* [**No Chat Reports**](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports) – Disables the new chat reporting system
* [**Mod Menu**](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) – View and configure installed mods

---

### ℹ️ Defaults

* Tectonic underground rivers are disabled
* Sparse structure spread factor is set to 1.5
* Zombie Awareness wandering hordes are enabled
* Dynamic sounds from the sounds mod are disabled
* Iron golems are replaced by clay golems
